overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through Night City at dusk. The player navigates under a highway overpass, crosses a street with light traffic, explores a muddy crash site containing a wrecked golden aerial vehicle, and ascends a long concrete staircase to an upper level.

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass past abandoned vehicles and debris

derelict white sedan with broken windows
bright yellow construction barrier with reflective strips
scattered trash and broken materials on wet ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete highway overpass in a dystopian urban environment. Abandoned vehicles including a white sedan and dark truck sit among debris piles. The ground is wet and reflective, with a neon yellow barrier visible to the left. The atmosphere is hazy and dimly lit by artificial lights.

events.description: exits covered area under overpass onto open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the overpass wall with a futuristic tower visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with glass facade and circular structures near the top
tall palm trees lining the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the open sidewalk, the overpass wall now runs along the left side while the path stretches forward toward a massive futuristic glass tower in the distance. Palm trees dot the hillside to the right. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the camera continues forward.

approaching the muddy area containing the crashed aerial vehicle

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road and approaching the crash site in the muddy median

vehicle approaching the intersection with bright headlights

entered.detail: wrecked golden aerial vehicle with spiked protrusions lying in muddy depression

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the open street as cars drive past, moving toward a muddy median area. A large crashed golden aerial vehicle with spiked protrusions lies wrecked in the depression ahead. The futuristic tower remains visible in the background while the overpass recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy crash site with wreckage and concrete barriers

events.description: approaching the crashed golden aerial vehicle wreckage
leaving crash site and approaching concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: walking around the crashed vehicle and observing the wreckage and surrounding area

person walking away from the crash site toward the street

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete barriers and seating blocks

segments.scene_description: Exploring the muddy crash site, the camera circles the wrecked golden aerial vehicle lying among debris and concrete blocks. Two NPCs are present - one sitting on a concrete block and another walking away. Metal scaffolding stands to the left while the futuristic tower looms in the foggy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: beginning ascent up long concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the upper level

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs with worn steps ascending between walls
warm yellow lights mounted on the stairway walls

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a long concrete staircase flanked by walls with warm mounted lights. The crash site falls behind as the camera climbs steadily upward. The futuristic tower is now visible to the left through the hazy dusk sky as the stairs continue toward an upper level archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the dim shadows of an urban underpass toward an elevated vantage point overlooking a futuristic skyline. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass amidst abandoned vehicles and reflective wet ground, moving forward as the oppressive ceiling gives way to an open sidewalk lined with palm trees. As the camera crosses a busy street, the environment shifts into a muddy median containing the wreckage of a spiked golden aerial vehicle, with a towering glass skyscraper looming through the haze in the distance. The scene then lingers within the debris of the crash site, circling the golden wreck and nearby scaffolding before turning toward a long concrete staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs under the glow of warm mounted lights, leaving the crash site behind to climb toward an upper level archway against the dusky sky.
